quizQuestion:
久し{___}に田舎へ帰りました。
(After a long time I returned back to my hometown.)
pedagogicalNote: ~ぶり = first time in ~ (time span); ~直す = to do over/redo from scratch

quizQuestion:
３年{___}に日本に帰ってきました！
(I'm back to Japan after 3 years!)
pedagogicalNote: ~ぶり = first time in ~ (time span); ~直す = to do over/redo from scratch

quizQuestion:
雨が降ってきたなあ{___}飯にしないか
(Hey, it's starting to rain By the way you want to go get something to eat?)
pedagogicalNote: その上 = moreover/besides; それに = and furthermore; ところで = by the way (topic shift); そうすると = if that's the case/then; さもないと = or else/otherwise

quizQuestion:
( 「{___}」の他の意味 )私が説得したところであいつは耳をかさないだろう.

pedagogicalNote: その上 = moreover/besides; それに = and furthermore; ところで = by the way (topic shift); そうすると = if that's the case/then; さもないと = or else/otherwise
